name_en: Samson Fountain and Ottokar II Square
name_local: Samsonova kašna a náměstí Přemysla Otakara II.

phrases.cultural_note: Throwing coins into fountains is a common practice, often for good luck or wishes.

likely_response.local: Stačí vhodit minci, přání je dobrovolné.
likely_response.translation_en: Just throw in a coin, a wish is optional.

responses.english: Just throw in a coin, a wish is optional.
responses.french: Stačí vhodit minci, přání je dobrovolné.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Town Hall has tower access
phrases.text_local: Je možné vystoupat na věž radnice?
phrases.cultural_note: Many Czech town halls have towers, but public access varies by city and building.

likely_response.local: Bohužel, radniční věž není veřejnosti přístupná.
likely_response.translation_en: Unfortunately, the town hall tower is not open to the public.

responses.english: Unfortunately, the town hall tower is not open to the public.
responses.french: Bohužel, radniční věž není veřejnosti přístupná.

phrases.text_local: V kolik hodin běží vodní show?
phrases.cultural_note: Fountain shows often run on a set schedule, but may pause during maintenance or winter.

likely_response.local: Každou celou hodinu od deseti do šesti.
likely_response.translation_en: Every hour on the hour from ten to six.

responses.english: Every hour on the hour from ten to six.
responses.french: Každou celou hodinu od deseti do šesti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where White Tower tickets are
phrases.text_local: Kde se kupují lístky na Bílou věž?
phrases.cultural_note: The White Tower is a prominent landmark; the ticket office is typically right at its base.

likely_response.local: V pokladně vpravo od vchodu do věže.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office to the right of the tower entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket office to the right of the tower entrance.
responses.french: V pokladně vpravo od vchodu do věže.
